## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, SEO support, and unblocking the article backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content production is paused** pending the Product Feature Matrix, which is required to accurately revise the 48-article backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [**Top priority is revising \~23 AI articles** once the matrix is delivered; Gabby returns Monday to lead the effort.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [**GrowthX will provide immediate SEO support** (mockups, recommendations) and source a long-term consultant to fix the site's \~5,000 HubSpot errors and build a demand-gen strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [**The content North Star is driving MQLs** via multi-touch journeys, not direct demos. Key metrics will be LLM referral traffic and engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)

## Topics

### Content Backlog & Blockers

  - [**Blocker:** The 48-article backlog is stalled, preventing new content production.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [**Cause:** Revisions require the Product Feature Matrix to ensure accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [**Priority:** Once unblocked, the team will focus on the \~23 AI articles first.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [**Owner:** Gabby (returns Monday) will lead the revisions.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)

### SEO Support Needs

  - [**Problem:** Fieldguide lacks in-house SEO expertise, resulting in a disorganized website and \~5,000 HubSpot errors.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [**Goal:** Transform the website into a demand-gen channel with a clear strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [**GrowthX Support:**](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
      - [**Immediate:** A director will create mockups and implement technical fixes from the audit.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Long-term:** Source a consultant for ongoing strategy and accountability.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)

### 2026 Content Strategy

  - [**Pillar 1: Agents & AI**](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [Differentiate Fieldguide's integrated AI from competitors' add-on solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [**Pillar 2: Human-in-the-Loop**](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
      - [Counter AI fear by showing it supports humans, freeing them for strategic work.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [**Pillar 3: Market Leadership**](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [Own the narrative with competitive comparison articles (e.g., 20–30 like Navan's) to boost LLM/search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)

### Content Performance & Metrics

  - [**North Star:** Drive MQLs, not direct demos.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The product is complex, and sales cycles are long (3–8 months).](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [**Goal:** Move users from top-of-funnel articles to deeper content (whitepapers, videos) to qualify them.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [**Key Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
      - [**LLM Referral Traffic:** Volume and engagement rate.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
      - [**Engagement Rate:** A proxy for traffic quality.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [**Benchmark:** Redis (another GrowthX client) achieved \~50 LLM referrals last month after publishing \~50 articles, demonstrating the potential impact of clearing the backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Yasine:**](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
      - [Secure the Product Feature Matrix from Sid today (Feb 20).](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
      - [Send the matrix to Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Assign a director to begin SEO mockups and technical fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Source a long-term SEO consultant for Fieldguide.](https://fathom.video/share/HHV5LSq2D5GqcCEyXo8J-BPuoDe7gZfc?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
